db["users"].find({username:{$eq:'parshv'}})

db.productcollections.find({price:{$gt:600}})

db.productcollections.find({category:{$in:['jewelery','electronics']}});

db.productcollections.find().skip(5).limit(5)

db.productcollections.updateOne(
   { _id: ObjectId('67eb9c97fa4f951142e4d8b3') },
   { $set: { price: 777 } }
)

db.productcollections.findOne({_id:{$eq:ObjectId('67eb9c97fa4f951142e4d8b3')}})


db.productcollections.updateOne(
   { _id: ObjectId('67eb9c97fa4f951142e4d8b3') },
   { $unset: { description: "" } }
)

db.productcollections.deleteOne('67eb9c97fa4f951142e4d8b3')
